symptoms: Users in the loans department report intermittent timeouts when opening the core banking portal.
root_cause: Packet loss on the branch WAN circuit caused unstable application sessions.
resolution: Failed over traffic to the secondary MPLS link and opened a carrier ticket for circuit remediation.

symptoms: Employee receives emails on mobile but not in Outlook desktop client.
root_cause: Corrupted Outlook OST cache after a forced workstation shutdown.
resolution: Recreated the Outlook profile and rebuilt the local mailbox cache.

symptoms: Teller PC shows no bootable device found during morning startup.
root_cause: SSD failure detected by hardware diagnostics.
resolution: Replaced the SSD, reimaged the workstation, and restored user profile settings.

symptoms: Loan officers report the application closes when generating amortization schedules.
root_cause: Recent application patch introduced a compatibility issue with an older reporting DLL.
resolution: Rolled back the affected patch and deployed the vendor hotfix.

symptoms: SIEM generated alerts for successful login from an unusual overseas location.
root_cause: User credentials were compromised through a phishing email.
resolution: Disabled the account, reset credentials, revoked sessions, and enrolled the user in phishing awareness follow-up.

symptoms: Remote employee cannot connect to VPN and receives MFA validation failed message.
root_cause: User changed phones and did not migrate the authenticator app.
resolution: Reset MFA registration and verified successful VPN login.

issue_name: New Hire Missing Share Drive Access
symptoms: New analyst cannot access the department risk reporting shared drive.
root_cause: User was not added to the required Active Directory security group.
resolution: Added the user to the approved group after manager authorization.

symptoms: Branch employees report slow Wi-Fi and frequent disconnects in customer meeting rooms.
root_cause: Access point channel overlap after an automatic RF recalculation.
resolution: Adjusted wireless channel plan and reduced transmit power on adjacent access points.

symptoms: Internal audit team reports emails delayed by 30 to 45 minutes.
root_cause: Email security gateway queue buildup during attachment scanning.
resolution: Increased scanning worker capacity and released queued messages.

symptoms: Employees cannot release confidential print jobs using badge authentication.
root_cause: Faulty USB badge reader on the multifunction printer.
resolution: Replaced the badge reader and re-registered the printer with the print management server.

symptoms: Relationship managers are redirected repeatedly to the CRM login page.
root_cause: Expired SAML signing certificate in the identity provider configuration.
resolution: Uploaded the renewed certificate and validated SSO login.

symptoms: Endpoint protection quarantined a macro-enabled spreadsheet on a finance workstation.
root_cause: User opened a malicious attachment impersonating a vendor invoice.
resolution: Removed the file, ran a full endpoint scan, blocked the sender domain, and reported the campaign to security operations.

symptoms: Remote users cannot access the treasury application while connected to VPN.
root_cause: Treasury subnet missing from the VPN route policy.
resolution: Added the subnet to the VPN access profile and pushed updated routes.

symptoms: Database access request remains pending after two business days.
root_cause: Approver mapping pointed to a manager who recently transferred departments.
resolution: Updated approval routing and reassigned the access request.

symptoms: Operations team cannot reach the ATM monitoring dashboard from headquarters.
root_cause: Firewall rule expired after a temporary change window closed.
resolution: Submitted a permanent rule request and restored access after approval.

symptoms: Customer service user cannot see the complaints shared mailbox in Outlook.
root_cause: Mailbox permission was removed during a quarterly access cleanup.
resolution: Reapplied delegated mailbox access with business owner approval.

symptoms: Laptop works normally but external monitors remain blank when docked.
root_cause: Dock firmware was outdated and incompatible with the latest laptop BIOS.
resolution: Updated dock firmware and confirmed both monitors were detected.

symptoms: Several compliance workstations failed monthly patch deployment.
root_cause: Endpoint management agent service was stopped on affected machines.
resolution: Restarted the agent service and redeployed the patch package.

symptoms: Users report security training links are blocked by the web proxy.
root_cause: Training vendor domain was not allowlisted in the secure web gateway.
resolution: Added the vendor domain to the approved training category.

symptoms: Users receive client version not supported when connecting remotely.
root_cause: VPN gateway policy was updated to block outdated clients.
resolution: Upgraded VPN clients through endpoint management and verified compliance.

symptoms: User account locks every 15 minutes despite password reset.
root_cause: Old password stored in a mobile mail client caused repeated failed logins.
resolution: Removed the stale mobile account configuration and unlocked the user account.

symptoms: Traders report delayed market data updates during peak hours.
root_cause: QoS policy was not prioritizing market data traffic after a switch replacement.
resolution: Restored QoS configuration and monitored latency back to baseline.

symptoms: Bank emails to a partner are rejected with SPF alignment errors.
root_cause: New outbound relay IP was not added to SPF records.
resolution: Updated the SPF DNS record and verified successful partner delivery.

symptoms: Check processing scanner repeatedly reports paper jam with no visible obstruction.
root_cause: Worn feed rollers caused misfeeds during batch scanning.
resolution: Replaced feed rollers and recalibrated the scanner.

symptoms: Risk analysts cannot load the market risk Excel add-in.
root_cause: Add-in was disabled by Office after a previous crash.
resolution: Re-enabled the add-in and installed the latest signed version.

symptoms: DLP console reports attempted use of an unapproved USB storage device.
root_cause: Employee connected a personal flash drive to copy presentation files.
resolution: Blocked the device, notified compliance, and reminded the user of removable media policy.

symptoms: Remote users connect to VPN but internal hostnames do not resolve.
root_cause: VPN profile assigned an incorrect DNS server after configuration migration.
resolution: Corrected DNS server assignment and refreshed VPN client profiles.

symptoms: Access review shows a terminated contractor account still enabled.
root_cause: HR termination feed failed due to missing contractor ID mapping.
resolution: Disabled the account, removed group memberships, and corrected HR identity mapping.

symptoms: Payment processing server loses connectivity after cable maintenance.
root_cause: Server was patched into a disabled switch port.
resolution: Enabled the correct port and updated the rack connectivity record.

symptoms: Executive assistant cannot send emails due to mailbox quota warning.
root_cause: Large archived attachments accumulated in Sent Items.
resolution: Enabled online archive retention and moved old mail to archive.

symptoms: User reports trackpad lifting and laptop base bulging.
root_cause: Battery swelling due to hardware degradation.
resolution: Removed laptop from service and replaced battery under warranty.

symptoms: Legal team cannot find indexed loan documents using customer ID search.
root_cause: Search indexing service stopped after storage volume reached capacity.
resolution: Expanded storage, restarted indexing, and rebuilt affected indexes.

symptoms: Compliance dashboard flags several laptops as not encrypted.
root_cause: Encryption agent failed to escrow recovery keys after provisioning.
resolution: Forced key escrow, confirmed encryption status, and updated compliance records.

symptoms: Traveling executive cannot access VPN from an approved business location.
root_cause: Geo-IP database incorrectly classified the hotel network country.
resolution: Added a temporary exception and updated the geo-IP feed on the VPN gateway.

symptoms: Payments analyst cannot approve wire transfer review tasks.
root_cause: User was assigned read-only role instead of payment reviewer role.
resolution: Updated application role after approval from the payments operations manager.

symptoms: Contact center agents experience dropped calls during customer verification.
root_cause: Voice VLAN had congestion from misclassified backup traffic.
resolution: Corrected VLAN assignment and QoS classification for backup traffic.

symptoms: Users cannot view availability for treasury team calendars.
root_cause: Exchange availability service connector was misconfigured after a hybrid update.
resolution: Updated connector settings and restarted the availability service.

symptoms: Boardroom video meetings start without camera feed.
root_cause: USB camera was disconnected from the room controller during maintenance.
resolution: Reconnected the camera, secured cabling, and tested the meeting room system.

symptoms: Users see certificate warnings when accessing the internal HR portal.
root_cause: Intermediate CA certificate was missing from the workstation trust store.
resolution: Deployed the intermediate certificate through group policy.

symptoms: Security monitoring detects admin login outside the approved change window.
root_cause: Administrator used break-glass credentials for non-emergency troubleshooting.
resolution: Revoked the session, documented the policy violation, and rotated the break-glass password.

symptoms: Users receive VPN timeout before approving the MFA prompt.
root_cause: MFA timeout value was shorter than normal mobile push delivery time.
resolution: Adjusted VPN MFA timeout and confirmed successful authentication.

symptoms: Quarterly access campaign fails to certify dormant accounts.
root_cause: Identity governance job excluded accounts without manager attributes.
resolution: Updated campaign scope and assigned orphaned accounts to business owners.

issue_name: DNS Record Missing for New App
symptoms: Users cannot reach the new fraud analytics application by hostname.
root_cause: Internal DNS CNAME record was not created during deployment.
resolution: Created the DNS record and validated resolution from branch and headquarters networks.

symptoms: Operations team receives vendor emails without attached settlement reports.
root_cause: Attachment filter blocked encrypted ZIP files by policy.
resolution: Set up secure file transfer with the vendor and advised against encrypted ZIP email delivery.

symptoms: Teller thin client does not recognize keyboard input after login screen.
root_cause: Damaged USB port on the thin client.
resolution: Moved the keyboard to a working port and scheduled thin client replacement.

symptoms: Underwriters report PDF viewer freezes on large mortgage document packages.
root_cause: Outdated PDF viewer plugin had a memory leak with large files.
resolution: Updated the PDF viewer package and disabled the legacy plugin.

symptoms: CASB flags user consent to an unverified third-party app requesting mailbox access.
root_cause: User approved a malicious OAuth application from a phishing page.
resolution: Revoked app consent, removed tokens, and blocked the application tenant-wide.

symptoms: Reimaged laptop does not show the corporate VPN profile.
root_cause: Device was placed in the wrong endpoint management deployment group.
resolution: Moved the device to the correct group and synced VPN profile policy.

symptoms: Internal auditor cannot access the evidence collection module.
root_cause: Provisioning connector failed to assign the audit module entitlement.
resolution: Reprocessed the provisioning task and confirmed entitlement in the application.

symptoms: Branch reports slow teller transactions and high router CPU utilization.
root_cause: Routing loop introduced by an incorrect static route.
resolution: Removed the bad static route and verified routing table stability.

symptoms: New compliance staff do not receive regulatory alert emails.
root_cause: Dynamic distribution list filter excluded users with updated department naming.
resolution: Updated the recipient filter and validated membership preview.

symptoms: Branch cannot print debit cards due to ribbon error.
root_cause: Incorrect ribbon type installed in the card printer.
resolution: Installed the approved ribbon type and recalibrated the printer.

symptoms: Treasury users report overnight liquidity reports take over 20 minutes to load.
root_cause: Database statistics were stale after bulk data import.
resolution: Updated database statistics and scheduled recurring maintenance.

symptoms: Firewall logs show repeated outbound connections to a known malicious domain.
root_cause: Compromised workstation attempted beaconing after a drive-by download.
resolution: Isolated the workstation, reimaged the device, and blocked indicators across security tools.

symptoms: All certificate-based VPN users fail authentication after midnight.
root_cause: VPN client authentication certificate expired.
resolution: Renewed the certificate, updated the gateway trust chain, and pushed new client certificates.

symptoms: Access requests for finance apps skip manager approval and fail policy checks.
root_cause: Workflow condition used an outdated finance department code.
resolution: Updated workflow logic and replayed affected requests.

symptoms: External vendor cannot connect to the approved statement processing endpoint.
root_cause: NAT rule pointed to the retired server IP after migration.
resolution: Corrected the NAT target and verified vendor connectivity.

symptoms: Customer-facing emails sent by wealth advisors lack the mandatory disclaimer.
root_cause: Signature management policy did not include the new advisor group.
resolution: Added the group to the signature policy and forced a client policy refresh.

symptoms: Secure operations room biometric reader shows offline in the access console.
root_cause: PoE switch port delivering power to the reader failed.
resolution: Moved the reader to a healthy PoE port and replaced the faulty switch module.

symptoms: Legacy check imaging application fails after Java update.
root_cause: Application requires a specific Java runtime version not pinned on the workstation.
resolution: Installed the supported runtime and configured the application-specific Java path.

symptoms: DLP alerts on attempted upload of customer account data to personal cloud storage.
root_cause: Employee attempted to move work files to an unapproved storage service.
resolution: Blocked the upload, notified compliance, and reviewed user activity with management.

symptoms: Users receive no available address errors during morning remote login peak.
root_cause: VPN address pool was too small after remote workforce expansion.
resolution: Expanded the VPN IP pool and monitored concurrent usage.

symptoms: Batch reconciliation job fails authentication overnight.
root_cause: Service account password expired due to missing non-expiring policy exception.
resolution: Rotated the password, updated the credential vault, and applied the approved service account policy.

symptoms: Compliance analysts cannot access a government regulatory filing portal.
root_cause: Site was miscategorized as newly registered and blocked by proxy policy.
resolution: Recategorized the domain and added a compliance exception.

symptoms: Executive reports an expected board packet email never arrived.
root_cause: Email was quarantined due to an oversized encrypted attachment.
resolution: Released the email after security review and moved the sender to a secure file exchange process.

symptoms: Back-office employee reports intermittent flickering on external display.
root_cause: Faulty DisplayPort cable caused signal instability.
resolution: Replaced the cable and verified stable display output.

symptoms: Employees cannot submit expense reports with corporate card transactions.
root_cause: Integration API token between the card processor and expense system expired.
resolution: Renewed the API token and replayed failed transaction imports.

symptoms: Vulnerability scanner reports critical patch missing on internal file server.
root_cause: Server was excluded from the patch window due to an incorrect maintenance tag.
resolution: Corrected the tag, installed the patch, and rescanned the server.

symptoms: Remote users experience slow access to cloud-hosted collaboration tools.
root_cause: Traffic was hairpinned through the data center VPN instead of local internet breakout.
resolution: Updated split tunnel policy for approved SaaS destinations.

symptoms: New employee has two identities and inconsistent application access.
root_cause: HR feed created a duplicate record due to mismatched legal name and preferred name.
resolution: Merged identities and reconciled group memberships.

issue_name: Core Banking Customer Table Lock Contention
symptoms: Customer service users report long waits when opening customer profiles during peak branch hours.
root_cause: A nightly batch job held locks on customer reference tables longer than expected.
resolution: Changed the batch isolation level, added supporting indexes, and rescheduled the job outside peak hours.

symptoms: Finance users cannot complete daily payment reconciliation because the report times out.
root_cause: The reconciliation query performed full table scans after transaction volume increased.
resolution: Created composite indexes, updated database statistics, and validated report completion time.

symptoms: Audit dashboards show stale transaction evidence for the previous business day.
root_cause: Database replication workers were throttled by insufficient redo log throughput.
resolution: Increased redo log capacity, restarted replication workers, and confirmed lag returned to baseline.

symptoms: Risk analysts cannot access updated exposure data in the morning risk dashboard.
root_cause: The warehouse load failed when a source file contained an unexpected nullable field.
resolution: Updated the ETL validation mapping, reprocessed the file, and added schema drift alerting.

symptoms: Treasury application intermittently returns database connection unavailable errors.
root_cause: Application sessions were not released after failed liquidity report generation.
resolution: Patched the connection handling defect and increased pool monitoring thresholds.

symptoms: Operations team reports settlement processing fails after a database release.
root_cause: A stored procedure parameter change was deployed without updating the calling service.
resolution: Rolled back the procedure, deployed the compatible service version, and added release dependency checks.

symptoms: Compliance retention dashboard shows customer archive jobs incomplete for two branches.
root_cause: Archive tablespace reached capacity before the retention job completed.
resolution: Expanded archive tablespace, reran the retention job, and configured capacity alerts.

symptoms: Daily backup report shows failed validation for the loan servicing database.
root_cause: Backup verification could not read a corrupted backup segment on the storage appliance.
resolution: Removed the corrupted segment, triggered a fresh backup, and completed restore verification.

symptoms: Business reporting queries route to the primary database and slow online transactions.
root_cause: The read replica was marked unhealthy after certificate rotation.
resolution: Updated replica certificates, restored health checks, and moved reporting traffic back to the replica.

symptoms: Audit finds a reporting account with write permissions on transaction tables.
root_cause: A temporary permission grant from a migration was not removed after validation.
resolution: Revoked write permissions, reviewed audit logs, and added an expiration date to future temporary grants.

symptoms: Customer statement files fail to upload to the secure cloud storage bucket.
root_cause: A bucket policy update denied writes from the statement generation service role.
resolution: Corrected the bucket policy, validated service role access, and replayed failed uploads.

symptoms: Remote operations staff cannot launch cloud-hosted virtual desktops.
root_cause: The VDI control plane could not allocate sessions because the desktop pool reached capacity.
resolution: Expanded the desktop pool, enabled autoscaling, and verified user login.

symptoms: Deployment pipeline cannot publish artifacts to the banking application environment.
root_cause: The pipeline IAM role lost write permissions after a least-privilege policy update.
resolution: Added the required scoped permissions and documented the deployment role baseline.

symptoms: IT operations receives hundreds of low-value alerts from a cloud workload overnight.
root_cause: A new monitoring rule used an overly sensitive CPU threshold for batch processing nodes.
resolution: Adjusted alert thresholds, added sustained-duration criteria, and closed duplicate alerts.

symptoms: Digital banking users experience errors during a planned managed database failover test.
root_cause: Application connection retry settings were shorter than the managed failover window.
resolution: Updated retry settings, repeated the failover test, and confirmed graceful reconnection.

symptoms: The sanctions screening service fails to start after secret rotation.
root_cause: The service identity was not granted access to the rotated key vault secret version.
resolution: Granted version access, restarted the service, and updated the rotation runbook.

symptoms: Finance reports an unexpected increase in cloud spend for analytics workloads.
root_cause: A development analytics cluster was left running over the weekend without auto-shutdown.
resolution: Stopped the cluster, enabled auto-shutdown policies, and added budget alerts.

symptoms: Internal users receive TLS errors when opening a cloud-hosted claims portal.
root_cause: The load balancer certificate renewal automation failed due to missing DNS validation.
resolution: Renewed the certificate, fixed DNS validation, and monitored the next renewal cycle.

symptoms: Customer notification events remain queued and are not sent after account updates.
root_cause: The serverless function timeout was too low for larger notification batches.
resolution: Increased timeout settings, optimized batch size, and replayed queued events.

symptoms: A cloud-hosted reporting service cannot reach the on-premises data API.
root_cause: A network security group rule removed the approved API subnet during cleanup.
resolution: Restored the approved rule, validated connectivity, and updated cleanup review controls.

symptoms: Operations users report customer service cases remain stuck in pending assignment.
root_cause: A workflow scheduler job stopped after an application node restart.
resolution: Restarted the scheduler, reassigned stuck cases, and added service health monitoring.

symptoms: Loan officers cannot upload signed customer documents to the loan processing portal.
root_cause: The portal rejected files after a MIME type validation rule was tightened incorrectly.
resolution: Corrected the validation rule and reprocessed affected document uploads.

symptoms: Customer service agents cannot find accounts created in the last business day.
root_cause: The application search index refresh job failed after a node disk alert.
resolution: Cleared disk space, rebuilt the search index, and restored incremental indexing.

symptoms: Treasury approvers receive an error when opening high-value wire approvals.
root_cause: A rules engine update returned an unexpected risk score format to the UI.
resolution: Deployed a parser fix, retested high-value transfers, and completed pending approvals.

symptoms: Employees cannot submit address change forms in the HR self-service portal.
root_cause: A required downstream validation API endpoint was changed without updating the portal.
resolution: Updated the API endpoint configuration and replayed failed form submissions.

symptoms: Compliance managers do not see quarterly attestation tasks in the application dashboard.
root_cause: The task generation job skipped a business unit because of an outdated hierarchy code.
resolution: Corrected the hierarchy mapping and regenerated the missing attestation tasks.

symptoms: Audit users cannot export evidence packages for regulator review.
root_cause: The export service exceeded memory limits when packaging large evidence bundles.
resolution: Increased service memory limits, split exports into chunks, and verified package integrity.

symptoms: Customer complaint cases show incorrect SLA deadlines for priority complaints.
root_cause: Holiday calendar rules were not loaded into the case management application.
resolution: Imported the approved holiday calendar and recalculated affected SLA deadlines.

symptoms: Treasury dashboard opens but the cash position widget is blank.
root_cause: A frontend release referenced an outdated API response field.
resolution: Patched the widget mapping and validated dashboard data with treasury users.

symptoms: Legal users do not receive assignment notifications for new matter records.
root_cause: Notification template migration disabled the matter assignment event trigger.
resolution: Re-enabled the event trigger, resent missed notifications, and added template deployment checks.
